---
name: Security vulnerability
about: Report a security issue (handled privately, not via public issues)
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security"]
---

## What to do instead (required)

Do **not** open a public GitHub issue for security-sensitive bugs.
Please report vulnerabilities privately so we can address them before disclosure.

## How to report

- Email: `nonameuserd007@outlook.com`
- Include: a clear description, affected versions/paths, and steps to reproduce.
- If you can, sanitize sensitive data (do not include secrets).
